with:
  # Build clauses for each triple
      clauses: list[str] = [_main_clause(t.subject, t.predicate, _clean(t.object)) for t in triples]
  
      # Combine clauses into a single fluent sentence
      if not clauses:
          return ""
      if len(clauses) == 1:
          sentence = clauses[0] + "."
      else:
          # Join all but the last clause with commas
          middle = ", ".join(clauses[:-1])
          # Add the final clause with a coordinating conjunction
          sentence = f"{middle}, and {clauses[-1]}."
      # Capitalise the first character of the sentence
      return sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]
